$comment: Layer D for TABSUM: static data-flow equivalence between the IR and migrated candidate A (OCCURS O1/O2). The table W-VAL is one logical region: its four cells (filled by the four ACCEPTs) union into input positions 0..3, and a subscripted reference W-VAL(I) derives from that region. W-TOTAL sums the region; W-FEE adds the 2% rate, the /100 shift, and half-up rounding.
